ops.title: Run watcher v002 promotion gate from E8 verdict (auto-promote if clean, else report)

ops.text: either ~/.cc-steer/models/watcher/current resolves to v002 with correct metadata (8B 4-bit base, render_version 2, thresholds, auc) and the daemon serves it, or a hold decision with numbers is journaled to master log c4703abe8
